mapper.select: SELECT SUM(PV_GEN.gen_val) / 1000 FROM ( SELECT * FROM tb_pv_gen WHERE site_id = #{site_id} AND YEAR(std_date) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(std_date) = MONTH(NOW()) ) as PV_GEN LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_site_rec_issued as REC_issued ON PV_GEN.std_date >= REC_issued.rec_issued_power_from AND PV_GEN.std_date < REC_issued.rec_issued_power_to

SELECT SUM(sell_rec_num) AS sell_rec_num, SUM(sell_rec_value) AS sell_rec_value FROM tb_site_rec_book WHERE site_id = #{site_id} AND YEAR(sell_rec_time) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(sell_rec_time) = MONTH(NOW()) AND DAY(sell_rec_time) = DAY(NOW())

SELECT SUM(sell_rec_num) AS sell_rec_num, SUM(sell_rec_value) AS sell_rec_value FROM tb_site_rec_book WHERE site_id = #{site_id} AND YEAR(sell_rec_time) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(sell_rec_time) = MONTH(NOW())

SELECT SUM(sell_rec_num) AS sell_rec_num, SUM(sell_rec_value) AS sell_rec_value FROM tb_site_rec_book WHERE site_id = #{site_id} AND YEAR(sell_rec_time) = YEAR(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AND MONTH(sell_rec_time) = MONTH(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
SELECT SUM(sell_rec_num) AS sell_rec_num, SUM(sell_rec_value) AS sell_rec_value FROM tb_site_rec_book WHERE site_id = #{site_id} AND YEAR(sell_rec_time) = YEAR(NOW())
SELECT SUM(sell_rec_num) AS sell_rec_num, SUM(sell_rec_value) AS sell_rec_value FROM tb_site_rec_book WHERE site_id = #{site_id} AND YEAR(sell_rec_time) = YEAR(NOW()-INTERVAL 1 YEAR)

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_FORMAT(MAX(sell_rec_time), '%Y-%m-%d')) * 1000 AS price_time, SUM(sell_rec_num) AS sell_rec_num, SUM(sell_rec_value) AS sell_rec_value FROM tb_site_rec_book WHERE site_id = #{site_id} AND YEAR(sell_rec_time) = YEAR(NOW()) GROUP BY MONTH(sell_rec_time)

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_FORMAT(MAX(price_time), '%Y-%m-%d')) * 1000 AS price_time, MAX(accum_trading_vol) - MIN(accum_trading_vol) AS accum_trading_vol FROM tb_spot_market group by YEAR(price_time), MONTH(price_time), DAY(price_time) order by price_time desc

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_FORMAT(B.last_time, '%Y-%m-%d')) * 1000 as price_time, A.open_price, B.highest_price, B.lowest_price, A.close_price FROM tb_spot_market as A, ( SELECT MAX(highest_price) AS highest_price, MIN(lowest_price) AS lowest_price, MAX(price_time) AS last_time FROM tb_spot_market GROUP BY YEAR(price_time), MONTH(price_time), DAY(price_time) ) as B WHERE A.price_time = B.last_time
